Philosophy
A photograph is not taken — it is built, breath by breath, shadow by shadow, in the space between two people who decide to be honest with each other.
— Duque Photography
Duque Photography — Accra, 2024
The Artist

DUQUE
QUARSHIE

Duke Tetteh-Quarshie — known professionally as Duque Photography — is a published photographer born and based in Accra, Ghana. With over a decade behind the lens, he has built a reputation as one of West Africa's most compelling voices in commercial fashion and beauty photography, drawn to the tension between light and shadow, and the quiet power of a face caught in an honest moment.

Rooted in Ghana's rich visual culture and inspired by the pioneering tradition of Accra's studio portraiture, Duque brings a cinematic precision to every shoot — whether a high-concept editorial campaign or an intimate portrait session. His work has taken him across West Africa and beyond, and he remains available to travel wherever the image demands it.

Duque Photography
How It Works

THE
PROCESS

01
Consultation

Your story, your goals, your vision. Every session begins with an honest conversation.

02
Direction

Mood boards, location scouting, wardrobe guidance — the full pre-production experience.

03
The Shoot

A calm, focused session guided by expertise in light, composition, and human presence.

04
Delivery

Hand-crafted retouching. Private online gallery delivered within 2–3 weeks.
